name: Black Immigrants Bail Fund
description: Provides bond assistance specifically for Black immigrants detained by ICE, addressing the disproportionate targeting and higher bond amounts this community faces.

name: Freedom for Immigrants — National Bond Fund
description: A nationwide fund that also operates a free detention visitation network, providing both bond assistance and community accompaniment to detained people.

name: LGBTQ Freedom Fund
description: Posts bond for LGBTQ+ people held in immigration and criminal detention, with a focus on those facing the greatest safety risks inside facilities.

name: Pima Monthly Meeting Immigration Bond Fund
description: A Quaker meeting-based fund providing bond assistance for immigrants detained in the Tucson area.

name: CLUE Detained Immigrant Bond Fund
description: A faith-labor alliance fund providing bond assistance for immigrants detained in Southern California.

name: NorCal Resist Sacramento Region Bond Fund
description: Posts immigration bonds for people detained in the Sacramento region, part of a broader resistance and rapid response network.

name: Orange County Justice Fund
description: Provides bond assistance for immigrants detained in Orange County, California.

name: Long Beach Justice Fund
description: A community fund providing immigration bond assistance for people detained from the Long Beach area.

name: Familias Reunidas Immigration Bond Fund
description: Works to reunite families separated by immigration detention through bond assistance.
area: Detained in Otay Mesa Detention Center or Imperial Regional Detention Facility

name: San Diego IRC — Borderlands Get Free Fund
description: A border-region fund run by the San Diego Immigrant Rights Consortium focused on freeing people detained in the San Diego / Imperial Valley area.
area: Detained in Otay Mesa Detention Center or Imperial Regional Detention Facility or San Diego area or Imperial County residents

name: Immigrant Freedom Fund
description: Posts immigration bonds for people detained at the Aurora ICE Processing Center, one of the largest immigration detention facilities in the country.

name: Georgia Immigration Bond Fund
description: Provides bond assistance for immigrants detained in Georgia, which hosts several major ICE detention facilities.

name: Midwest Immigration Bond Fund
description: A revolving bond fund serving detained immigrants across Illinois, Indiana, Kentucky, Minnesota, and Wisconsin through community fundraising and advocacy.
area: Serves IL, IN, KY, MN, WI

name: Prairielands Freedom Fund
description: Provides immigration bond assistance for people detained in Iowa and the surrounding prairieland region.

name: Connecticut Bail Fund
description: Provides bond assistance for immigrants detained in Connecticut.

name: Immigrant Bail Fund
description: A Connecticut-based revolving fund that posts immigration bonds and advocates for fair and humane immigration court practices.

name: Mainers for Humane Immigration — Freedom Fund
description: Posts immigration bonds for people detained in Maine, run by a coalition advocating for more humane immigration enforcement practices.

name: Beyond Bail & Legal Defense Fund
description: Provides both bond assistance and legal defense support for immigrants detained in Massachusetts.

name: Kent County Immigration Bond for Our Neighbor's Defense Fund
description: A community-based fund providing bond assistance for immigrants detained in the Kent County / Grand Rapids, Michigan area.

name: Las Vegas Family Unity Bond Fund
description: Provides bond assistance for immigrants detained in the Las Vegas area to help families stay together.

name: NH Conference UCC — Immigrant & Refugee Support Bond Fund
description: A United Church of Christ-affiliated group providing bond and support services for immigrants and refugees in New Hampshire.

name: First Friends of NJ & NY Bond Fund
description: A Quaker visitation and bond assistance organization serving immigrants detained in New Jersey and New York detention facilities.

name: The Fronterizx Fianza Fund
description: A border-region fund serving immigrants detained along the New Mexico and Texas border corridor.

name: Envision Freedom Fund
description: Provides bond assistance for immigrants detained in New York, with a focus on community-led organizing and rapid response.

name: Community Fund for Bond and Legal Support
description: Provides both bond assistance and funding for legal support for immigrants detained in Pennsylvania.

name: Immigration Bond and Advocacy Effort
description: A Pennsylvania-based effort combining bond posting with community advocacy on behalf of detained immigrants.

name: AMOR Bond Fund
description: Provides bond assistance for immigrants detained in Rhode Island.

name: Hutto Community Deportation Defense & Bond Fund
description: Focused on supporting immigrants detained at the T. Don Hutto Residential Center in Taylor, Texas — a facility that has detained women and families.

name: RAICES Bond Program
description: RAICES (Refugee and Immigrant Center for Education and Legal Services) operates a bond program alongside its legal services work, one of the largest immigrant legal aid organizations in the country.

name: Vermont Freedom Fund
description: Posts immigration bonds for people detained in Vermont.

name: Central Virginia Community Support Fund
description: A community-driven fund supporting immigrants detained in Central Virginia with bond assistance and community resources.

name: Fair Fight Immigrant Bond Fund
description: Provides bond assistance for immigrants detained in Washington state.
